historical_facts.claim: Clawback lets issuers recover issued tokens for regulatory purposes.
historical_facts.quote_or_summary: Known Amendments describes sanctions or illegal-activity examples for clawback recovery.

safe_route_label.label: HOLD_FOR_CHALLENGE
safe_route_label.notes: Issuer clawback is structurally governance-sensitive because it changes asset-control rights.

short_description: Issuer token recovery for regulatory or sanctions cases.

sources.summary: XRPL validators vote on amendments; more than 80% support must hold for two weeks, and servers without enabled amendment code become amendment-blocked.
XRPL's public known-amendments inventory, including status, default vote, amendment IDs, and descriptions.

technical_change: Adds issuer-controlled recovery of issued tokens.
